notes: v1.14.138 - Photoreal icon rollout STAGE B2a (Ask PHANTOM assistant mark). Swapped the Ask-PHANTOM card icon in the Command Center from phantom-prism.png to the branded phantom-ui-assistant-256.webp (the .ask card at pg-cmd, redesign-only / body.rd-gated). Single swap + added the ico-photoreal/icon-glow classes; the existing approved .ask .prism treatment is preserved (56px violet box, 36px breathing icon via askBreathe). phantom-prism.png was used ONLY in this card so legacy ?legacy=1 is byte-identical (pg-cmd never renders in legacy). Precache-first: phantom-ui-assistant-256.webp added to /icons/ and the sw.js precache array. SCOPE NOTE: the handoff B2 also named cc-ghost.webp (the faded Command-Lens hero watermark) + ico-ghost/ico-bot, but those were intentionally NOT touched - cc-ghost is a watermark treatment (detailed mark would look wrong) and ico-ghost is shared with the GHOST ECHO feature (out of scope). B6a (sop/bom/manifest DEPLOY_TOOLS) was HELD: those Tools cards render icons at 26px (photoreal would be mush; <40px is the SVG tier per the size law) and only 3 of 6 tools have art - needs a Tools-card mock, not a drop-in. phantom-prism.png left in precache (pre-existing asset; cleanup deferred to the Stage-5 sweep). Three-stamp lockstep 137->138. Gates: node --check x3 + sw.js, CSS brace balance, version.json valid JSON, ?legacy=1 byte-identical. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved, cold-aisle): close+reopen, confirm v1.14.138, Command Center > Ask PHANTOM card shows the new assistant mark (still breathing in its violet box), tapping still opens the voice sheet; Airplane Mode + reload = it still paints; ?legacy=1 = legacy unchanged. NEXT: Tier-2 legacy-shared CSS-gate swaps (B3 camera/search/log, B6 lock/key, B4 racks, B2 mic). PRIOR v1.14.137 = B1 mode/nav icons; v1.14.136 = Stage A final-art re-ship.
